papers_mined.title: Bedouin House of Hair Wadi Rum
papers_mined.note: Bedouin bayt ash-sha'ar: goat-hair woven on loom into 3-ply fala'if strips sewn together; loose weave heat-disperse + rain-swell-seal.

papers_mined.title: Bedouin Tent Hair Home Gulf News
papers_mined.note: Black tent 10-15°C cooler inside; loose weave allows convection; oil-saturated fiber repels water; swelling on rain seals weave.
